## What happened

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run command `...`
2. With config `...`
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include full error message, stack trace, or screenshot.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11 23H2]
- **PowerShell version:** [run `$PSVersionTable.PSVersion`]
- **Workbench version:** [tag or commit, e.g. v1.0.0 or `git rev-parse HEAD`]
- **1C platform version:** [e.g. 8.3.24.1467, if relevant]
- **Dump size:** [e.g. ~5000 files, ~50MB]

## Logs

```text
[paste relevant output from logs/06_healthcheck.log, logs/stats.json, etc.]
```

## Context

- Is the workbench read-only mode in use? [yes/no]
- Which MCP server is involved? [1c-code-index / 1c-skills / 1c-prompt-gallery / 1c-help-index / 1c-ibcmd]
- Does the issue reproduce on a fresh dump? [yes/no/not tested]

## Possible solution

If you have a suggestion for how to fix the bug.
